name: SD WebUI NSFW - AUTOMATIC1111
description: Stable Diffusion WebUI (AUTOMATIC1111) with NSFW filters disabled, API enabled, xformers, ControlNet & ADetailer extensions.
notes: Upload start.sh to /workspace/ before first run, or paste into the RunPod startup script field.
GPU recommendation: RTX 3090 / 4090 / A100 for best performance.
Add your model download URL inside start.sh before launching.
WebUI will be available on the exposed port 7860 via RunPod's proxy URL.
